caption: A woman with dark hair wearing a striped button-down shirt and a black over-the-ear headset is positioned in front of a plain white wall. To her left, light-colored curtains hang, partially obscuring a blue fabric backdrop. A flat, neutral-colored surface is visible behind her to the right. The woman is speaking, and her mouth movements shift across the sequence as she articulates words. Throughout the clip, the text "Nancy Ramya" remains visible in the bottom-left corner of each shot. The camera angle remains static, capturing her from the chest up as she engages in a conversation or presentation. The lighting is consistent across the scene, and there are no other people or significant objects present in the frame.
